title: 70th Birthday Gift Bags - Black Large Paper Present Bag With Rope Handles - Orirignal Parts 1955 - Gift Wrapping For Women & Men
features: Celebrate the big 7-0 with a laugh! Our “Original Parts Born In 1955” birth year gift bag is the perfect keepsake to honour a milestone birthday while keeping the humour alive. Designed for men and women alike, these bags come in a range of colours and sizes to suit anyone and any gift, from small tokens of friendship to larger surprises for loved ones!

PERFECT FOR BIRTHDAY GIFTS: Make their 70th birthday present extra-special with these attractive, versatile and robust black rope handled white, grey or black paper seventieth birthday gift bags featuring a fun birthday design! Perfect for wrapping a wide variety of birthday gifts for him or her.

EXTRA STRONG: Paper thickness approx 230 micron. The stiff matte paper design is surprisingly strong and can carry lots of birthday gift ideas such as sweets, books, ornaments, clothing, jewellery, perfume and many other birthday gift accessories for Women and Men.

NOTE: Please see images for scale to make sure this is the right size bag for your gifts Small Landscape bags: Width 16cm (6.3 inches), Height 12cm (4.7 inches), Depth 8cm (3.14 inches). Medium Landscape Bags: Width 25cm (9.84 inches), Height 20cm (7.87 inches), Depth 12cm (4.72 inches) Large Landscape bags: Width 33cm (13 inches), Height 25cm (9.84 inches), Depth 12cm (4.72 inches) Large Portrait bags: Width 25cm (9.84 inches), Height 30cm (11.81 inches), Height/Depth 12cm (4.72 inches)

FULLY RECYCLABLE: Made from recycled material and fully recyclable paper. Ideal for a luxurious alternative to plastic bags! Ideal for a luxurious alternative to plastic bags!This product is held by stout rope handles and will hold a substantial amount of weight. The Handles are also recyclable apart from the plastic end.PLEASE NOTE: The bags are printed on one side only NOT both sides.
